title: 'Annie the Musical' coming to Arts Theatre
description: GEORGE NEWS - Annie the Musical will be...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Annie the Musical will be showcased at the George Arts Theatre from 16 to 19 October. This is the latest production by White Peacock Studio, a hub for drama and musical theatre in George.


> The show promises to be a heartwarming and spectacular event that the whole family will enjoy.


Show director Quintin van Biljon is known for his dramatic flair and expertise. His previous directorial credits for the George Arts Theatre include Seussical, Grease, and Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat.

The cast of Annie the Musical features 14 talented youngsters, led by the exceptional Charlott-Ann Ahlmstrom in the role of Annie.

"Her remarkable portrayal is sure to capture hearts, alongside an impressive ensemble of young adults and adults whose performances will leave audiences in awe," said Van Biljon.

Tickets are available now at the George Arts Theatre. Contact the theatre on 064 881 8392 or visit the theatre between 09:00 and 16:00 on weekdays.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
